title: Better Babies
body:
![](https://i.imgur.com/Wvf4xw7.png) ### [Join the discord to interact with me and others about Minecraft](https://discord.gg/QZUJtsbkcY)
## ![](https://i.imgur.com/kD11hZu.png) OVERVIEW ![](https://i.imgur.com/kD11hZu.png) Alternative baby mobs for [Minecraft](https://minecraft.wiki/w/Minecraft)
Notes: Requires: - [Data API](https://modrinth.com/project/ZS3lIxKu) - [Gen Assets](https://modrinth.com/project/ZRGZa67i)
## ![](https://i.imgur.com/A8bTUqW.png) FEATURES ![](https://i.imgur.com/A8bTUqW.png) - *Visit the [wiki](https://github.com/GenMode/Minecraft/wiki/Better-Babies) for more information*
Entities | Temperment | Mob | |:-|:-:| | `Passive` | [![](https://i.imgur.com/tu7LUf0.png "Cat")](https://minecraft.wiki/w/Cat)[![](https://i.imgur.com/TUVzIXb.png "Chicken")](https://minecraft.wiki/w/Chicken) [![](https://i.imgur.com/mdzM4fO.png "Cow")](https://minecraft.wiki/w/Cow) [![](https://i.imgur.com/RvTf0k0.png "Fox")](https://minecraft.wiki/w/Fox) [![](https://i.imgur.com/wgm1Tip.png "Mooshroom")](https://minecraft.wiki/w/Mooshroom) [![](https://i.imgur.com/heFWf3Y.png "Pig")](https://minecraft.wiki/w/Pig) [![](https://i.imgur.com/XEoJ8eZ.png "Sheep")](https://minecraft.wiki/w/Sheep) [![](https://i.imgur.com/Iv5IJtq.png "Turtle")](https://minecraft.wiki/w/Turtle) | | `Neutral` | [![](https://i.imgur.com/Xc8yLtJ.png "Bee")](https://minecraft.wiki/w/Bee) [![](https://i.imgur.com/dHwVXfN.png "Goat")](https://minecraft.wiki/w/Goat) [![](https://i.imgur.com/dTpVttN.png "Llama")](https://minecraft.wiki/w/Llama) [![](https://i.imgur.com/B5JZnv9.png "Wolf")](https://minecraft.wiki/w/Wolf) |
